descriptionText: M/Y Somnium For Sale 2021 | Guest Cabins:5|CrewCabins:7The opportunity to acquire M/Y Somnium For Sale 2021 presents a compelling option for buyers seeking a well‑designed and carefully maintained Feadship of recent build. Delivered in 2021 and offered in good condition, Somnium reflects the quality and attention to detail expected from the shipyard, combined with a layout tailored for comfortable family cruising. Designed by Studio De Voogt, the yacht’s profile is clean and purposeful, while the interior, created by FM Architettura, offers a calm and refined atmosphere throughout.Specifications:• Brand: Feadship • Year: 2021 • Length: 55.2 m • Max. Beam: 9.8 m • Construction: Aluminium • Draught: 2.55 m • Gross Tonnage: 744 GT • Fuel Tank: 70,500 l • Water Tank: 15,200 l • Guest Cabins: 5 • Crew: 7 • Engines: 2 × 895.00 kW @ 2250 rpmConstructed with an aluminium hull, Somnium benefits from reduced weight and increased efficiency. The choice of aluminium also enables a shallow draught of 2.55 metres, allowing the yacht to explore a wide variety of cruising grounds that may be inaccessible to deeper‑draught vessels. At 55.2 metres in length, she maintains a balance between generous interior volume and exterior deck space, offering a gross tonnage of 744 GT.M/Y Somnium For Sale 2021 was conceived with active family use in mind, and this is evident in several of her key features. The enclosed tender garage allows for safe and organised storage of tenders and water toys, ensuring easy deployment once at anchor. Alongside this, the dedicated dive equipment store provides a convenient and secure space for guests who enjoy underwater exploration. These practical elements speak to a yacht built with thoughtful functionality rather than excess.Her exterior decks offer a wide range of areas for relaxation and leisure. The foredeck features a private lounge area that can serve as a quiet retreat while underway or at anchor. Aft, guests can enjoy the pool, which includes an adjustable floor for added versatility, as well as a contraflow system for those who wish to swim in place. The sun deck is arranged for both social time and quiet enjoyment, complemented by an inviting Jacuzzi island that becomes a natural focal point during cruising days.Inside, the yacht continues to prioritise comfort and usability. A well‑equipped gymnasium with a fold‑down platform enables guests to exercise with an open‑air connection to the sea when desired. The full‑beam owner’s stateroom includes a private balcony, creating a personal space that benefits from natural light and a direct link to the surrounding environment. Across her five guest cabins, accommodation remains flexible, making Somnium suitable for both family cruising and charter use, should a future owner wish to pursue that route. Her crew of seven have dedicated quarters that support smooth daily operations.Performance is delivered by two engines rated at 895 kW each at 2250 rpm, offering dependable propulsion and efficient cruising capability. With a fuel capacity of 70,500 litres and a water capacity of 15,200 litres, M/Y Somnium For Sale 2021 is well‑prepared for extended voyages.Overall, Somnium presents a well‑rounded package: a modern Feadship with practical features, attractive styling, and a condition that reflects careful ownership since her launch. She offers a strong option for buyers looking for a recent yacht ready for use without requiring extensive upgrades.
descriptionHtml:
M/Y Somnium For Sale 2021 | Guest Cabins:5|CrewCabins:7

The opportunity to acquire M/Y Somnium For Sale 2021 presents a compelling option for buyers seeking a well‑designed and carefully maintained Feadship of recent build. Delivered in 2021 and offered in good condition, Somnium reflects the quality and attention to detail expected from the shipyard, combined with a layout tailored for comfortable family cruising. Designed by Studio De Voogt, the yacht’s profile is clean and purposeful, while the interior, created by FM Architettura, offers a calm and refined atmosphere throughout.

Specifications:

• Brand: Feadship
• Year: 2021
• Length: 55.2 m
• Max. Beam: 9.8 m
• Construction: Aluminium
• Draught: 2.55 m
• Gross Tonnage: 744 GT
• Fuel Tank: 70,500 l
• Water Tank: 15,200 l
• Guest Cabins: 5
• Crew: 7
• Engines: 2 × 895.00 kW @ 2250 rpm

Constructed with an aluminium hull, Somnium benefits from reduced weight and increased efficiency. The choice of aluminium also enables a shallow draught of 2.55 metres, allowing the yacht to explore a wide variety of cruising grounds that may be inaccessible to deeper‑draught vessels. At 55.2 metres in length, she maintains a balance between generous interior volume and exterior deck space, offering a gross tonnage of 744 GT.

M/Y Somnium For Sale 2021 was conceived with active family use in mind, and this is evident in several of her key features. The enclosed tender garage allows for safe and organised storage of tenders and water toys, ensuring easy deployment once at anchor. Alongside this, the dedicated dive equipment store provides a convenient and secure space for guests who enjoy underwater exploration. These practical elements speak to a yacht built with thoughtful functionality rather than excess.

Her exterior decks offer a wide range of areas for relaxation and leisure. The foredeck features a private lounge area that can serve as a quiet retreat while underway or at anchor. Aft, guests can enjoy the pool, which includes an adjustable floor for added versatility, as well as a contraflow system for those who wish to swim in place. The sun deck is arranged for both social time and quiet enjoyment, complemented by an inviting Jacuzzi island that becomes a natural focal point during cruising days.

Inside, the yacht continues to prioritise comfort and usability. A well‑equipped gymnasium with a fold‑down platform enables guests to exercise with an open‑air connection to the sea when desired. The full‑beam owner’s stateroom includes a private balcony, creating a personal space that benefits from natural light and a direct link to the surrounding environment. Across her five guest cabins, accommodation remains flexible, making Somnium suitable for both family cruising and charter use, should a future owner wish to pursue that route. Her crew of seven have dedicated quarters that support smooth daily operations.

Performance is delivered by two engines rated at 895 kW each at 2250 rpm, offering dependable propulsion and efficient cruising capability. With a fuel capacity of 70,500 litres and a water capacity of 15,200 litres, M/Y Somnium For Sale 2021 is well‑prepared for extended voyages.

Overall, Somnium presents a well‑rounded package: a modern Feadship with practical features, attractive styling, and a condition that reflects careful ownership since her launch. She offers a strong option for buyers looking for a recent yacht ready for use without requiring extensive upgrades.
